title: All Aboard
description: Welcome aboard the HMS Princess Diana. A cruise like no other. Escaped convicts, malfunctioning Neuralinks, clashing authorities, and a captain who’s still fighting a war that’s long over. Don’t you worry though: here on the entertainment deck, no matter what happens, the show must go on! Anand Sankar brings his unique, award-winning character-comedy stylings to the stage with this, his debut show. “Distinguishes themselves on sheer talent” ★★★★ — Broadway Baby
